overview: Mono-Green Landfall accelerates mana by playing multiple lands each turn to trigger landfall abilities repeatedly. The deck leverages signature creatures like Badgermole Cub, Icetill Explorer, and Mightform Harmonizer to convert land drops into immediate board presence, card advantage, or combat stats. Success depends on maintaining a steady stream of land drops while protecting key triggers from disruption in Standard.
win_conditions: Overwhelm the opponent with a large, pumped Badgermole Cub
Trigger Mightform Harmonizer repeatedly to draw into finishers
Use Icetill Explorer to stabilize and outvalue opponents through landfall triggers

keep_criteria: Hands with two or more lands and a signature creature
Early landfall triggers like Badgermole Cub on turn one or two
Mana acceleration to enable Icetill Explorer by turn three
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking early landfall triggers or ramp

early_game: Prioritize playing lands to trigger landfall abilities immediately
Cast Badgermole Cub early to establish a growing threat
Use cheap ramp or landfall triggers to accelerate toward Icetill Explorer
mid_game: Drop multiple lands per turn to maximize Mightform Harmonizer triggers
Protect key creatures with blockers or evasion if available
Trade efficiently while maintaining landfall trigger count
late_game: Flood the board with lands to trigger massive landfall effects
Push combat with a pumped army to close the game
Use card draw from landfall to find sweepers or finishers

key_cards.name: Badgermole Cub
key_cards.role: Early-game landfall beneficiary that grows with each land drop
key_cards.notes: Cast on turn one or two to establish a threat; prioritize playing lands immediately after to trigger its growth ability.

key_cards.name: Icetill Explorer
key_cards.role: Mid-game engine that stabilizes the board through landfall synergy
key_cards.notes: Hold back lands to trigger its ability when it enters or when lands are played; use it to draw cards or pump other creatures.

key_cards.name: Mightform Harmonizer
key_cards.role: Late-game multiplier that converts land drops into combat stats or card advantage
key_cards.notes: Play after establishing a board presence; sequence land drops to trigger it multiple times per turn for maximum impact.

sequencing_tips: Always play lands before casting creatures to ensure landfall triggers resolve before the creature enters
Sequence Mightform Harmonizer after playing your final land for the turn to maximize triggers
Prioritize dropping Icetill Explorer when you have multiple lands in hand to chain triggers

matchups.advice: Play lands aggressively to pump Badgermole Cub quickly and outpace early pressure
Use Icetill Explorer to draw into answers and play lands to trigger Mightform Harmonizer for value
Race with landfall triggers while protecting key creatures from mid-game threats

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Archetype name and signature cards imply land-drop synergy and acceleration.
